current.headline: NYC Put Speed Governors on 700 Cars; Speeding Dropped 64%; Nobody Sells Them
current.notes: All 7 critics passed ≥8.5 (round 1). Ready to ship as #245. Deferred: #244 (NHTSA paper tiger) shipped today 2026-05-13.

last_completed.headline: NHTSA Ran 997 Recalls in 2025. It Ordered Exactly One. The Manufacturer Doesn't Exist.
